name: VCAPCD Authority to Construct / Permit to Operate (Rule 10)
what_it_does: Requires a Ventura County APCD permit before constructing, operating, or modifying any equipment that may emit air contaminants, unless exempted by Rule 23.

hypotheses.question: Does the new or modified equipment require a VCAPCD Authority to Construct / Permit to Operate?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: VCAPCD Rule 10 requires a permit to construct/operate emitting equipment unless a Rule 23 exemption applies.
